productDisplayName: Fila Men's Maverick Low Black Red Canvas Shoe
description: Get ready to hang out in style and comfort in these Maverick Lows from fila. This is a fresh take on a classic tennis shoe design. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Canvas uppers with textile lining for maximum comfort and protection Lace-ups for snug Fit Brand logo on the side of heel in stylized design Brand logo appliqued on the tongue Gum rubber toe box and toe guard for protection of the forefoot and to enhance durability Midsole Lightly cushioned insole for all day comfort EVA midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole Gum rubber outsole with diagonal multi-directional grooves for greater grip Wash careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash
